summary: Overdue Follow-up Inbox Fix Testing - All features verified. The fix adds school-level overdue follow-up detection (Section 5) to both coach and director inbox endpoints. Sophia Garcia (athlete_10) now correctly shows: (1) 'Overdue follow-up' signal in riskSignals, (2) severity=critical with riskScore=100, (3) schoolCount=3 with all 3 schools (Arizona State, U of Arizona, San Diego State) in schoolIssues/schoolBreakdown, (4) whyNow mentions 'Overdue school follow-ups compounded by overall inactivity'. Both Coach and Director UI correctly display the overdue follow-up signals with school names.
critical_code_review_comments: coach_inbox.py: Section 5 (lines 167-191) - correctly queries programs with overdue next_action_due dates and creates 'overdue_followup' issue entries with school names - VERIFIED
director_inbox.py: Section 5 (lines 202-226) - correctly queries programs with overdue next_action_due dates and creates 'overdue_followup' issue entries with school names - VERIFIED
risk_engine.py: SIGNAL_BASE_SCORE includes overdue_followup=55, COMPOUND_RULES includes overdue_followup+no_activity=1.45 multiplier - VERIFIED
risk_engine.py: SIGNAL_LABELS, CONFIDENCE_MAP, ROLE_ACTIONS all include overdue_followup entries - VERIFIED
CoachInbox.js: SIGNAL_CTA includes 'Overdue follow-up' with 'Act now' label and red color - VERIFIED
TopPriorityCard.js: schoolBreakdown display shows 'Also affected' section with school-issue pairs - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (Sophia Garcia athlete_10 has 3 programs with overdue next_action_due dates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Overdue follow-up inbox fix verified. Key changes: (1) Both coach_inbox.py and director_inbox.py now have Section 5 that queries programs collection for overdue next_action_due dates, (2) Creates 'overdue_followup' issue entries with school names, (3) Risk engine scores overdue_followup+no_activity compound at 1.45x multiplier, (4) Sophia Garcia (athlete_10) correctly shows critical severity with 3 schools. Coach view shows school issues in 'Up Next' rows, Director view shows schoolBreakdown in TopPriorityCard 'Also affected' section.

director_inbox_overdue_followup.details: Director inbox returns overdue_followup signals with school names for Sophia Garcia

sophia_school_breakdown_3_schools.details: Sophia Garcia shows schoolBreakdown with 3 schools in director inbox

coach_ui_overdue_signal.details: Coach view UI shows Sophia's card with 'Overdue follow-up' signal, 'Across 3 schools', and all school names listed

director_ui_school_breakdown.details: Director view TopPriorityCard shows 'Also affected' section with school breakdown and overdue follow-up signals

risk_engine_compound_scoring.details: Risk engine properly scores overdue_followup + no_activity compound as elevated severity (riskScore=100, severity=critical)

no_regressions.details: All existing inbox items still render correctly with required fields

sophia_data.whyNow: Overdue school follow-ups compounded by overall inactivity — relationships at risk
